testcase.name: test_create_webhook

failure.message: assert 'id' in {'message': 'Webhook created successfully', 'note': "Save this secret securely - it's used to verify webhook signatures", 'secret': 'de1e4735-ff10-42e2-8e0c-6f8f6dd08aa8', 'webhook_id': '9d5db8d2-d25f-40e0-9b4d-5e8ca69b27cd'}

testcase.name: test_list_webhooks

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'available_events': ['user.created', 'user.updated', 'user.deactivated', 'timesheet.clocked_in', 'timesheet.clocked_out', 'ticket.created', ...], 'webhooks': [{'created_at': '2026-02-01T19:29:11.777524+00:00', 'events': ['user.created', 'ticket.created'], 'failure_count': 0, 'headers': None, ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:346: in test_list_webhooks assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'available_events': ['user.created', 'user.updated', 'user.deactivated', 'timesheet.clocked_in', 'timesheet.clocked_out', 'ticket.created', ...], 'webhooks': [{'created_at': '2026-02-01T19:29:11.777524+00:00', 'events': ['user.created', 'ticket.created'], 'failure_count': 0, 'headers': None, ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_test_webhook
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:369: in test_test_webhook webhook_id = create_response.json()["id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'id'

testcase.name: test_encrypt_decrypt_data

failure.message: AssertionError: Decrypted data should match original: None != Sensitive employee SSN: 123-45-6789 assert None == 'Sensitive employee SSN: 123-45-6789'

testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:420: in test_encrypt_decrypt_data assert decrypted_value == test_data, f"Decrypted data should match original: {decrypted_value} != {test_data}" E AssertionError: Decrypted data should match original: None != Sensitive employee SSN: 123-45-6789 E assert None == 'Sensitive employee SSN: 123-45-6789'

testcase.name: test_admin_timesheets_pdf_export
testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:525: in test_admin_timesheets_pdf_export assert response.status_code in [200, 204], f"Expected 200/204, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/204, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please try again later.", "retry_after": 60} E assert 429 in [200, 204] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_leave_requests_pdf_export

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200/204/404, got 429 assert 429 in [200, 204, 404] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:546: in test_leave_requests_pdf_export assert response.status_code in [200, 204, 404], f"Expected 200/204/404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/204/404, got 429 E assert 429 in [200, 204, 404] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tickets_pdf_export

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200/204/404, got 429 assert 429 in [200, 204, 404] + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_multitenant_features.py:558: in test_tickets_pdf_export assert response.status_code in [200, 204, 404], f"Expected 200/204/404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200/204/404, got 429 E assert 429 in [200, 204, 404] E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
